hero.subtext: Designing and shipping production-grade AI systems — from LLMs and RAG pipelines to multi-agent architectures and computer vision.

services.label: Services
services.heading: What I Do
services.subtext: End-to-end AI engineering — from research and prototyping to production deployment at enterprise scale.

brand.title: LLM & Generative AI
brand.desc: Custom large language model integrations, prompt engineering, fine-tuning with LoRA/QLoRA, and production-ready generative AI pipelines using OpenAI, Anthropic, and open-source models.

web.title: RAG & Knowledge Systems
web.desc: Retrieval-augmented generation pipelines with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector), semantic search, hybrid retrieval, and document intelligence for enterprise knowledge bases.

motion.title: Multi-Agent Architectures
motion.desc: Autonomous agent systems built with LangGraph, LangChain, and AutoGen — orchestrating complex workflows, tool use, memory, and human-in-the-loop decision making.

dev.title: Computer Vision & MLOps
dev.desc: Object detection, segmentation, and classification models deployed at scale. Full MLOps pipelines with Azure ML, Docker, and CI/CD for reliable model serving in production.

about.label: Background
about.heading: 3.5+ Years Shipping Production AI
about.para1: I'm Hassan Masood, a Sr AI/ML Engineer based in Lahore. I specialize in LLMs, RAG pipelines, multi-agent architectures, and computer vision — delivering measurable impact across enterprise products at Datics AI.
about.para2: I've built 8+ AI products leveraging LangGraph, LangChain, LlamaIndex, and Azure's full AI stack. I'm passionate about prompt engineering, fine-tuning, and vector databases that power intelligent systems at scale.
about.team_sub: Open to collaborating on AI-driven products and engineering challenges.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.heading: Trusted by Teams
testimonials.q1: Hassan delivered a production RAG system in record time. The retrieval accuracy exceeded our expectations and the system has been running flawlessly in production for six months.
testimonials.q2: The multi-agent pipeline Hassan built reduced our document processing time by 70%. His deep knowledge of LangGraph and prompt engineering is exceptional.
testimonials.q3: Working with Hassan felt like having a senior AI architect on the team. He understood our business goals and translated them into a robust, scalable AI system.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.subtext: Have a project in mind? Let's talk about how AI can solve your hardest engineering challenges.
contact.placeholder_message: Tell me about your project or idea...
contact.success_sub: Thanks for reaching out — I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
